title: Process Injection Attacks and Detection
html:
Process Injection Attacks and Detection

Sample Program Locations

Local Injection

C:\injection\local\local_shellcode_inj.exe

Sample HTB DLL

C:\injection\htbdll.dll

Remote Injection

C:\injection\remote\injection1.exe

TEH Injection Sample

C:\injection\threadhijacking\threadhijacking.exe

APC Injection

C:\injection\apc\apcinjection.exe

Map View Injection

C:\injection\mapview\mapview_remote.exe

PE Injection

C:\injection\pe\peinjection.exe

Process Hollowing tool

C:\injection\hollow\hollow.exe

Hollow Sample

C:\injection\hollow\demo\Hollow.exe

Tools Usage

Moneta - Enumerate only regions related to suspicious memory

C:\injection\tools\Moneta64.exe -m ioc -p 1234

PE-Sieve - Scan the process memory for signs of a shellcode

C:\injection\tools\pe-sieve64.exe /shellc 3 /pid 1234

Check the details of a specific MITRE technique eg. T1055.002

Invoke-AtomicTest T1055.002 -ShowDetails

Execute Atomic Test with ID T1055.002

Invoke-AtomicTest T1055.002

Generate msfvenom Shellcode to execute calculator app

msfvenom --platform windows --arch x64 -p windows/x64/exec CMD=calc.exe -e x64/xor -f c -v shellcode

Compile a C program into exe file

x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc <program.c> -o <output.exe> -m64 -s

Compile a c program into DLL file

x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc -shared -o <output.dll> <program.c> -m64 -s

WinDbg Commands

Opens the debugger help documentation

.hh

Displays type information for a symbol or structure at the specified address; -rN for recursion depth.

dt [-rN] [type] <addr>

Display details of the PEB structure

dt _PEB <address>

Display details of the EPROCESS structure

dt _EPROCESS <address>

Show the Process Environment Block (PEB)

!peb

Show the Thread Environment Block (TEB)

!teb

List all active processes

!process 0 0

Evaluates and displays a C++ expression.

??

Evaluates and displays a MASM expression; -rN for recursion depth.

? [-rN] <expr>

Dereferences and displays the pointer at the specified address.

poi(<addr>)

List all loaded modules in the process

lm

Disassemble instructions at a given memory address

u <address>

Set a breakpoint at a memory address

bp <address>

List all active breakpoints

bl

WINAPI/NTAPI Functions Reference

Inject an asynchronous procedure call (APC)

QueueUserAPC

Modify thread execution context (used in thread hijacking)

SetThreadContext

Unmap memory from a process (used in Process Hollowing)

ZwUnmapViewOfSection

Windows Security Event IDs Reference

Process Creation

Detect suspicious processes

Handle Requested for an Object

Detect OpenProcess

Registry Modification

Look for persistence mechanisms

Access Attempt on an Object

Track process injections

Service Installation

Detect malware persistence

Service Unexpectedly Terminated

Look for process crashes

New Service Installed

Detect unauthorized services

Event Log Service Started

Identify system restarts

Event Log Service Stopped

Detect suspicious shutdowns

Sysmon Event IDs for Detection

C:\Program Files\rohitab.com\API Monitor\apimonitor-x64.exe

API Monitor

x64dbg

SysinternalsSuite

ProcessHacker

Moneta

C:\Tools\pe-sieve64.exe

PE-Sieve

C:\AtomicRedTeam\invoke-atomicredteam

Atomic Red Team
